name: Sage Dressing for Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the bread cubes, chopped onion, chopped parsley, rubbed dried sage, and egg. Add enough broth until the stuffing is moistened and holds together.
2. Stuff the prepared mixture loosely into the roasting chicken. Fasten with skewers to close it.
3. Place the breast side up on a shallow rack in a roasting pan.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 375 degrees F for 1 3/4 to 2 1/4 hours or until juices run clear. Baste several times with pan juices.
DIABETIC EXCHANGE: One serving (with skin removed after baking) equals 4 lean meat, 2 starch, 1 vegetable; also 359 calories, 128mg sodium, 85mg cholesterol, 26gm carbohydrate, 42gm protein, 8gm fat.
